name: THE THING
description: Benjamin J. Grimm is unquestionably the rock star of any team he's on. Always at the forefront of the fight, the Thing shields his allies with his unbreakable form, selflessly fending off any harm that comes their way.
lore: When Ben Grimm signed up to pilot an experimental spacecraft for his pal Reed Richards, he never imagined he'd return from the flight transformed into a monster. Even though cosmic rays turned him into the Thing, Ben still has a heart of gold beneath his rocky exterior. Since New York City plunged into eternal night, Ben has devoted himself to protecting his home from the monsters plaguing it.

stats.Attack Interval: Double strike 0.33s between attacks, 1s between sets.

abilities.name: Stone Haymaker
abilities.description: Deliver a devastating Heavy Blow. Can Knock Down flying enemies.

stats.Damage: 55+10% of enemies' max Health per hit
stats.Special Effect: Move forward 3 meters while punching; gain Bonus Health equal to damage dealt (up to 150); once hit, this ability can knock down flying enemies to the ground

abilities.name: Yancy Street Charge
abilities.description: Continuously charge forward, launching up enemies and leaving behind a zone at the final position that prevents the use of mobility abilities

stats.Damage: Charge: 30; ground slam: 20; immobilization zone: 15 per/s
stats.Spell Field Range: Ground slam: 8m radius, 2.5m high cylindrical spell field. Immobilization zone: 8m radius, 4m high cylindrical spell field
stats.Special Effect: Gain 200 Bonus Health during skill activation

abilities.name: Embattled Leap
abilities.description: Jump toward an ally and apply damage reduction to yourself and allies within the landing area

stats.Cooldown: Basic Cooldown 3s, with a charge of 10s per use
stats.Special Effect: Apply a 20% damage reduction effect to self and 20% damage reduction to all allies within 5m of his landing point for 3s

abilities.name: Battle Blitz
abilities.description: Jump toward an enemy and apply Vulnerability to enemies within the landing area

stats.COOLDOWN: Basic Cooldown 3s, with a charge of 10s per use, shares the same Cooldown with the E Key ability
stats.SPECIAL EFFECT: Apply a 20% Vulnerability to all enemies within 5m of his landing point for 3s

abilities.name: Clobberin' Time
abilities.description: Use immense power to launch up all enemies in front of the Thing into the air

stats.Range: Step spell field: 3m high, 10m wide, advancing 2m every 0.1 seconds, up to a maximum of 18m

abilities.name: Unyielding Will
abilities.description: Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects

stats.Special Effect: Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects

received.name: Cosmic Fastball
received.description: Wolverine and The Thing can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, The Thing can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forward

received.name: GAMMA CHARGE
received.description: Hulk charges Black Panther and The Thing with gamma radiation. When Black Panther's health is low, he gains a gamma shield, becoming Unstoppable and blocking attacks. The Thing gains Gamma Gauntlets, boosting Damage and range of his Rocky Jab and Stone Haymaker. Dealing damage with these attacks grants Bonus Health, and maximum Bonus Health cap is increased

received.name: Flying Thing
received.description: Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage, launching enemies, and creating a zone that disables mobility abilities

stats.Damage: Launch-up spell field causes 30 damage; mobility abilities disabling spell field causes 15 damage per second
stats.Launch Up Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 8m and a height of 1m
stats.Mobility Abilities Disabling Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 8m and a height of 8m

base.description: Enter an enhanced state upon activation. For the duration, The Thing's fists are violently engulfed in flames. Every Rocky Jab deals splash damage, and every Stone Haymaker creates an explosion, dealing damage in a frontal cone.

stats.Special Effect: Increases the cast speed of Rock Jab and Stone Haymaker

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Human Torch, Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage and Stun to enemies. The Thing then automatically enters his flaming enhanced state upon landing.

base.description: Generate a layer of Psionic Armor upon activation, granting Bonus Health scaling off currently missing Health.

stats.Special Effect: When Health reaches 50%, Bonus Health generation frequency increases by 100%

enhanced.description: When teaming up Invisible Woman, the Psionic Armor is fortified. While active, every time The Thing takes a set amount of damage, the armor pulses out a wave of area healing for allies. Furthermore, the conversion ratio for missing Health into Bonus Health is increased.
